notes: The uploaded source zip did not contain .git metadata, so local git history for this workspace begins from a baseline-import commit created on 2026-04-10 before Gate 253 execution.
The locked doctrine files were applied verbatim; no content-level doctrine review or editing was performed inside Gate 253.

global_rules.sequential_execution: One leaf at a time. One gate at a time. One branch per gate.
global_rules.anti_drift_closeout: A gate is not closed until repo-root PLANS.md, the canonical gate map, the active leaf ledger, and the active execution log move together on the same branch.
global_rules.bounded_proof: Gate 253 uses bounded control-surface proof only; no broad suite.

leaves.title: Apply locked doctrine replacements and close the governance micro-pack
leaves.objective: Replace AGENTS.md and docs/01_NORMATIVE.md verbatim, update the minimum control surfaces and receipts, prove byte-for-byte replacement, and package the updated repo.
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: This leaf is execution-only. The uploaded doctrine replacements are locked and are applied verbatim rather than reassessed.
ordered_actions: Replace repo-root AGENTS.md from the locked uploaded file with no content edits.
Replace docs/01_NORMATIVE.md from the locked uploaded file with no content edits.
Create the one-gate / one-leaf governance micro-pack and route closeout truthfully in PLANS.md and the canonical gate map.
Prove byte-for-byte replacement by checksum and binary comparison.
Run bounded proof only, then record the execution-log and changelog receipts.
Close the pack with no active pack routed and package the updated repo.
forbidden_actions: Do not rewrite the uploaded doctrine files.
Do not widen Gate 253 into general workflow repair or runtime change work.
expected_evidence: Byte-for-byte checksum match for both locked doctrine files
Router quartet closed through Gate 253 with no active pack
Updated repo zip created for download
definition_of_done: Both locked doctrine files are applied verbatim.
The router quartet and receipts agree on Gate 253 closeout.
The updated repo snapshot is packaged as a zip.
leaves.packaging_requirement: Create a downloadable full-repo zip from the updated local workspace because GitHub push is unavailable in this environment.

contradiction_scan: The uploaded source zip lacked prior .git metadata. Gate 253 therefore records a fresh local git baseline rather than pretending to preserve unavailable upstream commit history.
state_invariants: No active pack is routed after Gate 253 closeout.
Gate 253 remains a one-gate / one-leaf governance micro-pack only.
AGENTS.md and docs/01_NORMATIVE.md remain verbatim replacements of the locked uploaded files.
